# tfe_registry_providers

This data source can be used to retrieve public and private providers from the private registry of an organization.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization. If omitted, organization must be defined in the provider config.
- `registry_name` (String) Whether to list only public or private providers. Must be either `public` or `private`.
- `search` (String) A query string to do a fuzzy search on provider name and namespace.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `providers` (List of Object) List of providers in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--providers))

<a id="nestedatt--providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `providers`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `registry_name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
